narrative: AI Team Skills framework repo itself. v2.3.0 added four Core Protocols (Continuity, Adaptation, Self-Evolution, Clarification), a Project DNA brain file (project-profile.json), and a propose-don't-edit channel (proposed-improvements.md). v2.4.0 adds the 18th agent — Technology Strategist — and the Technology Decision Protocol (Protocol 5) with the /team-stack command: needs-based language/framework/architecture/stack selection (never popularity), decision matrix, >=3 alternatives, risks, mitigations and a draft ADR that Architecture ratifies. All 18 skills carry an Operating Protocols block. This is the framework's own brain, kept as a worked example.
last_session_summary: v2.4.0: added Technology Strategist (18th agent) + /team-stack + Protocol 5. Wired ownership boundary into architecture, orchestration+roster into team-lead, technology/dependency VETO into security. Registered in skill.json (agent, command, brain, dependencies; bumped 2.4.0), propagated agent table/command/version/17->18 across all activation+rule+mirror files, completed CLI SKILL_FILES, and updated the brain scripts (auto-activator + brain_manager) to seed/restore/validate the full 18-agent roster.

session_log.event: v2.3.0 smart-skills upgrade (4 Core Protocols + Project DNA + quality review of all 17 skills)
v2.4.0: added Technology Strategist (18th agent) + Technology Decision Protocol (Protocol 5) + /team-stack; full multi-platform propagation + script roster sync
